title: 20251021Wetreport5K88J458 47P
summary:
Main
• VLCCs Remains Supported as Charterers Consider New Trade Barriers - Following a subdued start to October, the VLCC segment shows early signs of support. In the Arabian Gulf, owners resisted further downward pressure amid a tightening tonnage list and expectations of increased activity linked to Saudi's November loading programs. Furthermore, sentiment improved as charterers sought early cover in response to China's recently implemented port fees on U.S.- linked vessels.
